data.title: DNO ASA Revives Trym Field and Eyes Expansion
data.description:
DNO ASA (GB:0MHP) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

DNO ASA has resumed production at its Trym field in the Norwegian North Sea after a five-year hiatus, expecting to achieve 3,000 barrels of oil equivalent per day. The company is also exploring further development opportunities in nearby discoveries and exploration prospects, potentially enhancing future output.

data.title: Nippon Denkai to Begin Rehabilitation Proceedings
data.description:
Nippon Denkai,Ltd. (JP:5759) has released an update.

Pick the best stocks and maximize your portfolio:

  • Discover top-rated stocks from highly ranked analysts with Analyst Top Stocks!
  • Easily identify outperforming stocks and invest smarter with Top Smart Score Stocks

Nippon Denkai, Ltd. has been ordered by the Tokyo District Court to commence civil rehabilitation proceedings as part of their efforts to restructure the company. This decision follows their recent petition and highlights the company’s commitment to navigating financial challenges with the help of relevant stakeholders. Investors and market enthusiasts will be watching closely as Nippon Denkai moves forward with their rehabilitation plan.
